basic_details.short_information: Delhi Electricity Regulatory Commission (DERC) Consultant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website derc.gov.in . A total of 10 vacancies have been announced through the DERC Consultant Recruitment 2026. Candidates with qualifications such as LLB, MBA/PGDM, CA/ICWA, or Engineering Degree in relevant disciplines are eligible to apply for these Consultant vacancies. The online application process for DERC Consultant Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 15 June 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply online through the direct link

qualification.details: Consultant (Law): Qualified LLB from a recognized University with 03 years experience preferably in commercial and civil matters labour. Consultant (HR): Recognized MBA/PGDM from a University. Minimum 03 years in Human Resources Government/PSU/State. Consultant (Tariff): Qualified CA/ICWA/MBA (Finance) full time from reputed institute/university. Experience in infrastructure/Banking/Large Audit Firms. Consultant (Civil Engg): Degree in Civil Engg from a recognized institute. Minimum 03 years experience in Technical specifications, design drawings, estimates, costing. Consultant (Elec Engg): Degree in Electrical/Power Engg from a recognized institution. Minimum 03 years experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the DERC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DERC to complete the application.
